title: ThreatLogPayload
description: Schema for a forwarded PAN-OS threat log entry. Threat logs capture security events detected by the firewall's threat prevention engines, providing detailed information about malware, exploits, spyware, command-and-control traffic, and other detected threats.

receive_time.description: Timestamp when the threat log entry was received by Strata Logging Service.

serial.description: Serial number of the Palo Alto Networks device that generated this threat log entry.

type.description: Log type identifier, always THREAT for threat log entries.

subtype.description: Threat log subtype indicating which threat prevention engine or signature category generated the detection event.

src.description: Source IP address of the session in which the threat was detected.

dst.description: Destination IP address of the session in which the threat was detected.

sport.description: Source port number of the session.

dport.description: Destination port number of the session.

app.description: Application identified by App-ID in the threat session.

threat_name.description: Name of the detected threat as defined in the Palo Alto Networks threat database and threat vault.

severity.description: Severity level of the detected threat as defined by the threat signature or detection engine.

action.description: Action taken by the threat prevention engine in response to the detected threat.

direction.description: Direction of the detected attack relative to the network session flow.

threat_id.description: Unique numeric identifier for the threat signature from the Palo Alto Networks threat vault. Used for threat intelligence lookup and signature reference.

rule_name.description: Name of the security policy rule that matched the session in which the threat was detected.

src_zone.description: Source security zone of the threat session.

dst_zone.description: Destination security zone of the threat session.

src_user.description: Source user identity if User-ID is enabled.

url_or_filename.description: URL or filename associated with the detected threat, depending on the threat subtype.

device_name.description: Hostname of the firewall that generated this threat log entry.

vsys.description: Virtual system name or identifier on the firewall.

log_forwarding_profile.description: Name of the log forwarding profile that forwarded this log entry.

output_format.description: Output format in which this log entry was forwarded.
